summary: Tested Kit-Zuweisungslogik (Kit Assignment Logic) with location-based Kit-ID format. All 4 features verified as working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: fetchLocationKits function (lines 319-352) correctly calculates nextKitNumber using regex pattern matching ^${locationId}-(\d+)-KIT$ and finds max sequence number
Location dropdown (lines 855-877) correctly displays slot_count badge when > 0, address and PLZ in two-line format
Kits at location section (lines 944-1003) correctly displays existing kits with status badge and component count
Kit ID preview (lines 1007-1025) correctly shows new Kit-ID format: {LOCATION_ID}-{SEQUENZ}-KIT with sequence number
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kit Assignment Modal (KitDetailModal.jsx) features verified. Navigate via Portal > Assets > Kits > Click kit row > Zuweisung tab > Select Europcar tenant > Select location. BERE01 location has 1 slot and displays correctly with slot count badge.

features_tested.TEST 1 - Location Dropdown shows Slot-Co: PASS - BERE01 location shows '1 Slots' badge in green (verified via dropdown content: 'BERE01 - BERLIN VAN TRUCK CARS IKC  1 Slots')
features_tested.TEST 2 - Location Dropdown shows Address: PASS - All locations display address with PLZ correctly. Examples: AACHEN (PLZ 52070), AUGSBURG (PLZ 86165), BERLIN CITY WEST (PLZ 10787), BERE01 (PLZ 10365)
features_tested.TEST 3 - Existing Kits display with sequ: PASS - 'Kits an BERE01' section shows '0 Kits vorhanden' badge and message. When kits exist, they would show in list with status and component count
features_tested.TEST 4 - Next Kit-ID calculation: PASS - Shows 'Neue Kit-ID nach Zuweisung: BERE01-01-KIT' with 'Sequenz-Nr. 01' (correctly calculated as first kit for BERE01)

code_verification.slot_count_display: Lines 863-867: Conditional rendering of slot_count badge when loc.slot_count > 0
code_verification.address_plz_display: Lines 869-874: Two-line format showing address, postal_code/zip, city, state
code_verification.next_kit_calculation: Lines 336-345: Regex matching ^${locationId}-(\d+)-KIT$ to find max sequence number, then nextKitNumber = maxNum + 1

test_data_notes.locations_with_slots: Only 1 location (BERE01) has slot_count > 0 (1 slot) - confirmed via API
test_data_notes.kits_at_test_locations: MUCT01, BERC01, BERE01 all show 0 kits - nextKitNumber correctly calculated as 01
